'''shabate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeitgeistily|zeitgeistily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-b-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeitgeistily|zeitgeistily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shabate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:shabate|shabate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shabatesher|shabatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabatesherĂ«m|shabatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shabatero|shabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabateshĂ«|shabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabateshĂ«m|shabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishabatero|gokishabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabateshĂ«|gokishabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabateshĂ«m|gokishabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshabankerom|goshabankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabankeshĂ«|goshabankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabankeshĂ«m|goshabankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshabankeya|goshabankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shabaterom|shabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabatemu|shabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shabateya|shabateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishabaterom|gokishabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabatemu|gokishabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishabateya|gokishabateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:shababate|shababate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shababatesher|shababatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shababatesherĂ«m|shababatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shababatero|shababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shababateshĂ«|shababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shababateshĂ«m|shababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishababatero|gokishababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishababateshĂ«|gokishababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishababateshĂ«m|gokishababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshababankerom|goshababankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshababankeshĂ«|goshababankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshababankeshĂ«m|goshababankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshababankeya|goshababankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shababaterom|shababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shababatemu|shababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shababateya|shababateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishababaterom|gokishababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishababatemu|gokishababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishababateya|gokishababateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:shĂŠbĂŠte|shĂŠbĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shĂŠbĂŠtesher|shĂŠbĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m|shĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠbĂŠtero|shĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|shĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|shĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠbĂŠtero|gokishĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|gokishĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|gokishĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshĂŠbĂŠnkerom|goshĂŠbĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«|goshĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goshĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshĂŠbĂŠnkeya|goshĂŠbĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠbĂŠterom|shĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠbĂŠtemu|shĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shĂŠbĂŠteya|shĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠbĂŠterom|gokishĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠbĂŠtemu|gokishĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishĂŠbĂŠteya|gokishĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:shafbafte|shafbafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shafbaftesher|shafbaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafbaftesherĂ«m|shafbaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafbaftero|shafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafbafteshĂ«|shafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafbafteshĂ«m|shafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafbaftero|gokishafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafbafteshĂ«|gokishafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafbafteshĂ«m|gokishafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshafbafnkerom|goshafbafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafbafnkeshĂ«|goshafbafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafbafnkeshĂ«m|goshafbafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshafbafnkeya|goshafbafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafbafterom|shafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafbaftemu|shafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shafbafteya|shafbafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafbafterom|gokishafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafbaftemu|gokishafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishafbafteya|gokishafbafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
